mapper.sql: SELECT ac.id, ac.user_id, u.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.posting_date, ac.deadline_date, ac.source_type, ac.status, ac.is_favorite AS favorite, ac.archived_at, ac.deleted_at, ac.created_at, ac.updated_at, ( SELECT MAX(jp.revision) FROM job_posting jp WHERE jp.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS latest_posting_revision, ( SELECT MAX(ja.created_at) FROM job_analysis ja WHERE ja.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS latest_job_analysis_at, ( SELECT MAX(ca.created_at) FROM company_analysis ca WHERE ca.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS latest_company_analysis_at FROM application_case ac JOIN users u ON ac.user_id = u.id

choose.when: ORDER BY ac.updated_at ASC, ac.id ASC
ORDER BY ac.created_at DESC, ac.id DESC
ORDER BY ac.created_at ASC, ac.id ASC
ORDER BY ac.deadline_date DESC, ac.id DESC
ORDER BY ac.deadline_date IS NULL, ac.deadline_date ASC, ac.id ASC
ORDER BY ac.company_name DESC, ac.id DESC
ORDER BY ac.company_name ASC, ac.id ASC
ORDER BY latest_job_analysis_at DESC, ac.id DESC
ORDER BY latest_job_analysis_at IS NULL, latest_job_analysis_at ASC, ac.id ASC
ORDER BY latest_company_analysis_at DESC, ac.id DESC
ORDER BY latest_company_analysis_at IS NULL, latest_company_analysis_at ASC, ac.id ASC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY ac.updated_at DESC, ac.id DESC

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ac.status = 'DRAFT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS draft_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ac.status = 'ANALYZING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS analyzing_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ac.status = 'READY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ready_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ac.status = 'APPLIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS applied_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ac.status = 'CLOSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS closed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM job_analysis ja WHERE ja.application_case_id = ac.id ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS missing_job_analysis_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM company_analysis ca WHERE ca.application_case_id = ac.id ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS missing_company_analysis_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM job_analysis ja WHERE ja.application_case_id = ac.id ) OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM company_analysis ca WHERE ca.application_case_id = ac.id ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS missing_any_analysis_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM job_analysis ja WHERE ja.application_case_id = ac.id ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM company_analysis ca WHERE ca.application_case_id = ac.id ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS complete_analysis_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ai_usage_log aul WHERE aul.application_case_id = ac.id AND aul.feature_type IN ('JOB_ANALYSIS', 'COMPANY_RESEARCH', 'JOB_POSTING_OCR') AND aul.status = 'FAILED' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed_usage_count FROM application_case ac JOIN users u ON ac.user_id = u.id
